## Checklist

- [ ] One thing per PR (no unrelated drive-by changes)
- [ ] Code style matches surrounding files
- [ ] Zero new runtime dependencies (or strong justification in description)
- [ ] Stdout is still reserved for JSON-RPC frames; logs go to stderr
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if a tool, env var, or behaviour changed
- [ ] Added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Added or updated tests in `smoke.test.mjs`
- [ ] No `apt_` / `aptr_` / `aps_` tokens in the diff or test fixtures
